svg_code:
<svg viewBox="0 0 640 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <style>
      @keyframes d04-float {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-15px); }
      }
      @keyframes d04-sway {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0px); }
        50% { transform: translateX(8px); }
      }
      @keyframes d04-pulse {
        0%, 100% { opacity: 0.85; }
        50% { opacity: 1; }
      }
      @keyframes d04-rotate-slow {
        0%, 100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
        100% { transform: rotate(5deg); }
      }
      @keyframes d04-bob {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-12px) rotate(-2deg); }
      }
      .d04-balloon-container {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08));
      }
      .d04-balloon-body {
        animation: d04-float 3.5s ease-in-out infinite;
      }
      .d04-balloon-string {
        stroke: #D0D0D0;
        stroke-width: 1.5;
        stroke-linecap: round;
      }
      .d04-shine {
        pointer-events: none;
      }
      .d04-gaudi {
        animation: d04-float 4.2s ease-in-out 0.3s infinite;
      }
      .d04-hadid {
        animation: d04-sway 3.8s ease-in-out 0.8s infinite, d04-float 4.5s ease-in-out 0.5s infinite;
      }
      .d04-gehry {
        animation: d04-float 3.9s ease-in-out 1.1s infinite;
      }
      .d04-landmark {
        animation: d04-bob 4.0s ease-in-out 1.4s infinite;
      }
      .d04-celebration {
        animation: d04-pulse 2.8s ease-in-out 1.7s infinite;
      }
    </style>
    
    <radialGradient id="d04-balloon-red" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FF6B7A;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#E63946;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C1121F;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d04-balloon-blue" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#6FA3C5;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#457B9D;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#2E5377;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d04-balloon-orange" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FFC266;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#F4A261;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#D97B00;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d04-balloon-teal" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#4FBFAA;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#2A9D8F;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#1B6B5F;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d04-balloon-purple" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#B88FFF;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#9B5DE5;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#6D28D9;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="d04-balloon-gold" cx="30%" cy="30%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FFB627;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="70%" style="stop-color:#F77F00;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#D62828;stop-opacity:1" />
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  
  <rect width="640" height="200" fill="#FFFEF5"/>
  
  <!-- Gaudi's Organic Forms - Sagrada Familia as Red Balloon -->
  <g class="d04-gaudi d04-balloon-container">
    <!-- String -->
    <path class="d04-balloon-string" d="M 60 120 Q 55 100 58 70" fill="none"/>
    <!-- Main balloon body - organic curved shape -->
    <ellipse cx="60" cy="60" rx="32" ry="38" fill="url(#d04-balloon-red)" opacity="0.9"/>
    <path d="M 35 60 Q 30 45 40 30 Q 50 20 65 25 Q 75 30 78 50 Q 80 70 75 85 Q 65 95 50 92 Q 40 90 35 75 Z" fill="url(#d04-balloon-red)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <!-- Shine -->
    <ellipse cx="48" cy="38" rx="12" ry="18" fill="white" opacity="0.35" class="d04-shine"/>
    <ellipse cx="52" cy="55" rx="8" ry="14" fill="white" opacity="0.25" class="d04-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Hadid's Flowing Curves - Heydar Aliyev Center as Blue Balloon -->
  <g class="d04-hadid d04-balloon-container">
    <!-- Flowing string paths -->
    <path class="d04-balloon-string" d="M 160 125 Q 155 95 158 65" fill="none"/>
    <path class="d04-balloon-string" d="M 175 130 Q 180 100 175 65" fill="none"/>
    <!-- Main flowing balloon -->
    <path d="M 130 50 Q 125 35 145 28 Q 170 25 185 40 Q 190 55 185 75 Q 175 95 155 100 Q 130 102 125 85 Q 122 70 130 50 Z" fill="url(#d04-balloon-blue)" opacity="0.9"/>
    <!-- Secondary flowing element -->
    <ellipse cx="162" cy="58" rx="28" ry="42" fill="url(#d04-balloon-blue)" opacity="0.8" transform="rotate(-15 162 58)"/>
    <!-- Shine -->
    <ellipse cx="150" cy="42" rx="14" ry="20" fill="white" opacity="0.38" class="d04-shine"/>
    <ellipse cx="170" cy="65" rx="10" ry="15" fill="white" opacity="0.28" class="d04-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Gehry's Deconstructed Forms - Guggenheim Bilbao as Orange Balloon -->
  <g class="d04-gehry d04-balloon-container">
    <!-- Multiple string attachments for deconstructed feel -->
    <path class="d04-balloon-string" d="M 270 125 Q 265 95 268 65" fill="none"/>
    <path class="d04-balloon-string" d="M 295 130 Q 300 100 295 65" fill="none"/>
    <path class="d04-balloon-string" d="M 280 128 Q 280 98 280 65" fill="none"/>
    <!-- Deconstructed geometric balloon pieces -->
    <ellipse cx="270" cy="55" rx="26" ry="36" fill="url(#d04-balloon-orange)" opacity="0.9" transform="rotate(12 270 55)"/>
    <path d="M 285 40 L 305 35 L 310 60 L 300 75 L 280 72 Z" fill="url(#d04-balloon-orange)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <ellipse cx="275" cy="75" rx="20" ry="28" fill="url(#d04-balloon-orange)" opacity="0.8" transform="rotate(-8 275 75)"/>
    <!-- Shine -->
    <ellipse cx="280" cy="48" rx="13" ry="18" fill="white" opacity="0.36" class="d04-shine"/>
    <ellipse cx="300" cy="62" rx="9" ry="13" fill="white" opacity="0.26" class="d04-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Landmark - Eiffel Tower as Teal Balloon -->
  <g class="d04-landmark d04-balloon-container">
    <!-- Twin string attachment -->
    <path class="d04-balloon-string" d="M 375 120 Q 370 85 372 55" fill="none"/>
    <path class="d04-balloon-string" d="M 395 125 Q 400 90 398 55" fill="none"/>
    <!-- Tall elegant balloon -->
    <ellipse cx="385" cy="50" rx="22" ry="45" fill="url(#d04-balloon-teal)" opacity="0.9"/>
    <path d="M 368 70 Q 365 55 385 35 Q 405 55 402 70 Q 398 85 385 90 Q 372 85 368 70 Z" fill="url(#d04-balloon-teal)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <!-- Shine -->
    <ellipse cx="378" cy="35" rx="10" ry="16" fill="white" opacity="0.37" class="d04-shine"/>
    <ellipse cx="388" cy="60" rx="8" ry="14" fill="white" opacity="0.27" class="d04-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Celebration Element - Christ the Redeemer as Purple Balloon -->
  <g class="d04-celebration d04-balloon-container">
    <!-- Central string -->
    <path class="d04-balloon-string" d="M 490 115 Q 488 85 490 50" fill="none"/>
    <!-- Outstretched arms as balloon curves -->
    <ellipse cx="460" cy="65" rx="18" ry="32" fill="url(#d04-balloon-purple)" opacity="0.85" transform="rotate(-35 460 65)"/>
    <ellipse cx="520" cy="65" rx="18" ry="32" fill="url(#d04-balloon-purple)" opacity="0.85" transform="rotate(35 520 65)"/>
    <!-- Main body -->
    <ellipse cx="490" cy="55" rx="28" ry="38" fill="url(#d04-balloon-purple)" opacity="0.92"/>
    <!-- Shine -->
    <ellipse cx="480" cy="38" rx="12" ry="18" fill="white" opacity="0.38" class="d04-shine"/>
    <ellipse cx="500" cy="50" rx="10" ry="16" fill="white" opacity="0.28" class="d04-shine"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Great Wall as Gold Balloon -->
  <g class="d04-gaudi d04-balloon-container" style="animation-delay: 2.0s">
    <!-- Winding string path -->
    <path class="d04-balloon-string" d="M 600 120 Q 598 90 602 60" fill="none"/>
    <!-- Undulating balloon form -->
    <path d="M 575 65 Q 570 45 585 35 Q 605 32 620 45 Q 625 60 620 80 Q 610 95 590 98 Q 575 95 575 65 Z" fill="url(#d04-balloon-gold)" opacity="0.9"/>
    <ellipse cx="600" cy="70" rx="24" ry="34" fill="url(#d04-balloon-gold)" opacity="0.85" transform="rotate(8 600 70)"/>
    <!-- Shine -->
    <ellipse cx="592" cy="48" rx="11" ry="16" fill="white" opacity="0.35" class="d04-shine"/>
    <ellipse cx="608" cy="65" rx="9" ry="13" fill="white" opacity="0.25" class="d04-shine"/>
  </g>
</svg>
description: Iconic world architectures drift heavenward as luminous balloons—Gaudi's organic passion, Hadid's fluid grace, and Gehry's fractured brilliance converge in a jubilant celebration of human creativity floating weightless through light.
